programs.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Pathfinders"
programs.desc: Pathfinders are elite paratroopers trained to go behind enemy lines, lead air insertions, gather intelligence, and execute high-risk, deadly missions.

programs.title: Bright Now S1 - "Growing Up Hadzabe"
programs.desc: Our earliest ancestors, before developing agriculture as a source of food, formed what is considered hunter-gather societies. The Hadzabe of Tanzania are considered one of the last of these tribes on the planet.

programs.title: Bright Now S1 - "Tastes Like T-Rex"
programs.desc: Modern birds are the most direct descendants of some of the most iconic dinosaurs to ever walk on this planet. Bue can science really enable us to alter chicken embryos to resemble their mightiest ancestor: T-Rex?

programs.title: Bright Now S1 - "Antarctica Science Below Zero"
programs.desc: Antarctica is a mysterious and unexplored continent. Thanks to the Chilean Antarctic Institute and the research center Dynamics of Marine Ecosystems of High Altitudes, scientists are suffering the extreme temperatures to study climate change.

programs.title: Bright Now S1 - "Last American Slave Ship"
programs.desc: The final ship to bring slaves to the United States has been hidden in the swamps of Mobile, Alabama for generations.

programs.title: Earthrise S1 - "Rewilding Patagonia"
programs.desc: We visit Patagonia National Park to find out how it became one of the biggest conservation projects in history.
